_note: Templates are organized by PURPOSE (what the slide is FOR), grounded in studying real top-creator carousels. A template = a CATEGORY (purpose) x a DIRECTION (aesthetic, see directions.json). Same purpose must exist in multiple aesthetics. 'role' = where it sits in a carousel arc (cover / content / recap / cta). 'templates' = existing templates that already serve this category. See reference/carousel-systems.md for the shared chrome/atoms/engagement system.

categories.name: Hook / Cover
categories.purpose: Slide 1 — stop the scroll and promise a payoff so people swipe.
categories.when_to_use: First slide of any carousel; standalone scroll-stoppers.

categories.name: Listicle / Tips
categories.purpose: Present N items/tips, one or many per slide.

categories.name: Feature / Benefit Grid
categories.purpose: Show 4-6 features/benefits as a scannable icon-card grid.

categories.name: Step-by-step / How-to
categories.purpose: Sequential instructions a reader can follow.

categories.name: Comparison / VS
categories.purpose: Contrast two options across matched attributes.

categories.name: Stat / Big Number
categories.purpose: One staggering metric as the hero.

categories.name: Benchmark / Leaderboard
categories.purpose: Rank competitors/options to prove a #1 claim.

categories.name: Before → After
categories.purpose: Dramatize a transformation between two states.

categories.name: Diagram / Explainer
categories.purpose: Explain a flow, architecture, or concept visually.

categories.name: Quote / Statement
categories.purpose: One powerful line — quote, hot take, manifesto.

categories.name: Checklist / Key Takeaways
categories.purpose: Recap or do's as ticked rows.

categories.name: Testimonial / Review
categories.purpose: Social proof from a person.

categories.name: Announcement / Launch
categories.purpose: Announce a drop, release, or event.

categories.name: Promo / Offer / Sale
categories.purpose: Push a discount, deal, or limited offer.
categories.when_to_use: Sales, coupons, launches with a price.

categories.name: Value Prop / Benefit Headline
categories.purpose: Land the emotional benefit + tag the offer.

categories.name: Product Showcase / Mockup
categories.purpose: Show the actual deliverable staged premium.

categories.name: Profile / Intro / About
categories.purpose: Introduce the creator/brand and the niche.

categories.name: Myth-bust / Contrarian
categories.purpose: Correct a wrong belief or flip conventional wisdom.

categories.name: Definition / Concept
categories.purpose: Define a term or unpack one idea clearly.

categories.name: Timeline / Roadmap
categories.purpose: Show chronology, phases, or a journey.
categories.when_to_use: History, roadmaps, step phases over time.

categories.name: Recipe / Formula Card
categories.purpose: Ingredients/inputs + steps in one card.

categories.name: FAQ / Q&A
categories.purpose: Answer common questions.

categories.name: Tool / Resource Roundup
categories.purpose: List tools/resources with a one-liner each.

categories.name: CTA / Outro
categories.purpose: Last slide — drive follow / save / comment / share / poll.
